hero.sub: We design stable, readable, transferable systems — for freelancers, associations and small structures.
hero.sub2: Paid once. Validated in 30 days. Guaranteed for life.
services.heading: WHAT WE DO
services.title: SERVICES
services.pricing.label: Our rates
s1.title: Showcase sites & portals
s1.body: Consistent sites, portals and platforms designed to last without hidden debt.
s1.benefit: A readable, fast presence with no technical debt. You can take it back, modify it, transfer it — without us.
s2.title: E-commerce & booking
s2.body: Lean, stable purchase and booking flows.
s2.benefit: Lean, stable purchase and booking flows. Every step of the journey is comprehensible — no black box.
s3.title: Automations
s3.body: Crawlers, document processing, reporting. Lean and stable architectures.
s3.benefit: Eliminate repetitive tasks without creating an opaque dependency on third-party services that may disappear.
s4.title: Crawlers & parsers
s4.benefit: Extract, structure and exploit raw data. No intermediary for what the machine can do alone.
s5.title: Document processing
s5.benefit: PDFs, invoices, forms, archives — turning bulk into readable, immediately usable structure.
s6.title: Reporting & dashboards
s6.benefit: Indicators you understand without training, updated without external intervention or SaaS subscriptions.
cta.heading: READY TO BUILD?
footer.motto: What is visible can be questioned.
contact.heading: CONTACT
contact.2ndparagraph: A human will read your message. Not a bot, not an automated script.
contact.1stparagraph: No sales forms. Just describe what you want to build, for whom, and within what timeframe.
contact.response.title: Response time
contact.requirements.title: What to mention
contact.requirements.body: Your need, your context (nonprofit / commercial), and whether you have a deadline constraint.
contact.after.title: What happens next
contact.after.body: A quick exchange to define the scope, then an honest estimate in credit‑minutes.
contact.privacy.title: Privacy
contact.privacy.body: No newsletter. No CRM. No automated follow-ups.
contact.form.label: Your need
contact.form.placeholder: What you want to build, for whom, within what timeframe...
contact.form.coords: Don't forget to include your contact details.
contact.form.reassure: NO NEWSLETTER · NO FOLLOW-UP · A HUMAN WILL READ YOUR MESSAGE
pricing.title: PRICING & METHOD
pricing.note: Prepaid credits — billed by the minute. A single rate applies depending on when the request is made.
pricing.grid.label: Pricing grid
pricing.c1.name: Helping hand
pricing.c2.name: Standard
pricing.c3.name: Extended
pricing.c4.name: Emergency
pricing.c5.name: Holidays
pricing.c5.desc: Announced holiday periods. A client mobilised during holidays means three people deprived of rest.
pricing.revenue.title: REVENUE-GENERATING PROJECTS
pricing.revenue.intro: E-commerce, booking, subscriptions — the rules change.
pricing.revenue.rule: Monthly minimum (e.g. €500 ex-VAT) OR % revenue (e.g. 3%) — never both combined.
pricing.revenue.body: The amount billed is always the higher of the two. My interests are aligned with yours: the more your online activity succeeds, the more invested I am in its success.
pricing.box1.label: Non-profit projects
pricing.box1.text: Pay once. Validated in 30 days. Free for life.
pricing.box2.label: For-profit projects
pricing.box2.text: A monthly minimum or a % of revenue — never both.
pricing.method.heading: From credit to guarantee: 4 steps.
pricing.step1.label: Implementation
pricing.step1.title: → Billable phase
pricing.step1.body: Prepaid credits, billed by the minute. Corrections included. No vague packages, no surprises.
pricing.step2.label: D+1 to D+30
pricing.step2.title: → Stabilisation
pricing.step2.body: 30 days of real-world use. Adjustments and corrections included within the scope of the deliverable.
pricing.step3.label: D+30
pricing.step3.title: → Validation
pricing.step3.body: Works 30 days under normal conditions = deliverable validated. The clock stops permanently.
pricing.step4.label: Post-validation
pricing.step4.title: → Lifetime guarantee
pricing.step4.body: Bug on our end = we fix it. Environment evolves = we adapt. Never billed twice.
pricing.inclus.heading: ✓ Included
pricing.inclus.1: Bugs from our implementation fixed for free
pricing.inclus.2: Adaptation if your server / CMS / PHP evolves
pricing.inclus.3: Updates within the scope of the validated deliverable
pricing.inclus.4: Never billed twice for the same deliverable
pricing.exclu.heading: × Not covered
about.title: ABOUT
about.qui.label: Who
about.qui.heading: Practitioners of functional minimalism.
about.qui.p1: Our role is not to sell hours, but to deliver stable, transferable systems.
about.qui.p2: A system doesn't need to be massive to be robust. It must be clear, proportionate and governed by simple rules.
about.qui.p3: We believe that work well done is honoured by its durability, not by the multiplication of invoices.
about.quoi.label: What
about.quoi.heading: What we do.
about.quoi.li2: tools calibrated for freelancers, associations and small structures,
about.quoi.li3: lean, stable architectures designed to last without hidden debt.
about.quoi.p2: Every deliverable ships with automated tests. Every bug is fixed once. Every fix becomes an irreversible gain.
about.comment.label: How
about.comment.heading: How we work.
about.comment.li1: delegate each responsibility to the most efficient level (server, database, code),
about.comment.li2: remove all decoration, all arbitrary complexity,
about.comment.li3: optimise execution by respecting the logic of machines.
about.comment.li4: never billed twice for the same work,
about.comment.li6: then a lifetime guarantee as long as the bug is reproducible.
about.comment.p3: If the test fails, we fix it. If the test passes but a problem occurs, that's a new context — and therefore new work.
about.pourqui.label: For whom
about.pourqui.heading: Those who refuse waste.
about.pourqui.body: For those who want clear, proven, transferable code. For those who know that value is not measured by volume, but by the rightness that remains.
about.valeurs.label: Values
about.valeurs.heading: The manifesto.
about.rule.label: — SINGLE RULE — NON-NEGOTIABLE —
about.rule.text: LaRéponse is a discipline with a single, non-negotiable rule : do not lie about complexity.
about.axioms.label: The manifesto axioms
about.axiom1.text: Reality is complex, and anything that claims otherwise merely displaces that complexity onto a hidden burden, a loss of agency, and power without accountability.
about.axiom2.text: That which conceals its complexity lies about itself, demanding trust rather than understanding; this is a form of coercion.
about.axiom3.text: Clarity is not simplicity, but the truthful exposure of structure. Minimalism is not reduction, but a refusal to mask what makes a thing work.
about.axiom4.text: Human forms accept human limits. Forms that demand adaptation — instead of meeting people where they are — export their cost.
about.axiom5.text: When effort is removed before understanding, autonomy collapses into dependency; ease without legibility weakens those who rely on it.
about.axiom6.text: Transmission that smooths structure produces conformity, not understanding; understanding requires resistance.
about.axiom7.text: Power grows where structure disappears; making structure visible then becomes an act of resistance.
about.axiom8.text: Those who shape things are responsible not only for outcomes, but for what they hide; there is no neutrality where form directs behaviour.
about.conclusion.text: What is visible can be questioned — and what can be questioned can be changed.
projects.title: PROJECTS
projects.intro: LaRéponse builds tools because reality demands them. Each project is born from a concrete problem — not a catalogue ambition. These are reusable, adaptable, transferable building blocks.
projects.dashbored.etym: "Dashboard" turned against itself — a work board, not a control panel.
projects.dashbored.why: Tools that freeze eventually become obstacles. Structure is earned through use.
projects.dashbored.forwhom: Collectives, associations, knowledge workers who build as they go.
projects.dashbored.what: Thinking environment with provisional structure. Patterns are only promoted if they withstand reality.
projects.dundun.etym: "Done and done." — two beats, two closures. An onomatopoeia of completion.
projects.dundun.why: Restore execution discipline without guilt-inducing calendars or fragmenting notifications.
projects.dundun.forwhom: People in cognitive overload, teams who want to see breakdowns rather than hide them.
projects.dundun.what: Prepare → Do → Close. A single active slot. The break is visible, therefore analysable.
projects.tenpoken.etym: Toki pona: "possible time, time in potential." Practising time — not taming it.
projects.tenpoken.why: Refusing the fiction of total mastery as much as that of retrospective narrative.
projects.tenpoken.forwhom: Creatives, freelancers, anyone who wants a light discipline without taxonomy.
projects.tenpoken.what: Event, Now, Window, Drift. No projects, no categories. Drift becomes an instrument of truth.
projects.jdad.etym: "JSON Data And Directions." Data as parent, directions as child — linked, not conflated.
projects.jdad.why: Stop conflating data and navigation in APIs, and paying the cost in parsing and latency.
projects.jdad.forwhom: API teams, IoT, edge, constrained networks wanting a predictable format.
projects.jdad.what: JSON format with _ as connotation signifier. Relations traversable in constant time.
projects.koral.etym: "Kollecto · Rapporto · Listo." Collect without forcing, connect to make accountable.
projects.koral.why: Concrete CRM shaped by the field — not by SaaS catalogues that never fit reality.
projects.koral.forwhom: Small organisations, service trades, associative contexts.
projects.koral.what: PHP MIT CRM on Kadro. Sessions, notes, planners, workers. Convention-over-configuration.
projects.badhat.etym: "Bits Are Decisive. HTTP As Terminal." — accountable before magical.
projects.badhat.why: Stop dressing up reality behind convenient abstractions. 25 years of field work distilled.
projects.badhat.forwhom: Developers who privilege causality over doctrine, the accountable over the magical.
projects.badhat.what: Minimal PHP core: hook → seek → loot → HTTP. File-system routing, bitmasks, explicit failure.
manifeste.text: We are not hour-sellers. We design stable, readable, transferable systems — for freelancers, associations and small structures. Paid once. Validated in 30 days. Guaranteed for life.
cta.text: The world is saturated with technical noise. LaRéponse does the opposite: clear systems, proportionate, governed by simple rules. Ready to build?
